title: Women are easily attracted to men who know these things
text: nice dinner out and completely ignore his girlfriend on a date it's incredibly rude this particular pointer reminds me of a relationship I was wanting I mean the guy I dated knew how to give women attention whenever we were out together he would never as much as look at another woman who walked by he always made me feel wanted made me feel heard at the end of the day I always walked away from our encounters completely pleased and not being able to wait to see him again and finally number 12 know how to buy her the right gifts if you were agree not to buy each other gifts for instance for a certain holiday or occasion make sure you buy one anyways trust me when giving gifts to a woman you don't have to spend all your money but you must never give her a crappy gift let it be thoughtful it's far better to make a gift on your own than to give her one that's tacky meaningless and just literally trash you don't have to buy her a million dollar house to get the love in return the same can be said of gifts they don't always have to be expensive just meaningful and well intended on the other hand if you're dating a woman who doesn't like thoughtful gifts then maybe just maybe you might be dealing with something completely different and it's imperative that you watch this video that I created about things women do if only she's in a relationship for your money I'll leave a link to that video in the description below as well I hope these tips were helpful and will help you go ahead to become a woman magnet where relationships are concerned subscribe to the channel if you want more of such content my name is Jessica I'll definitely catch you in the next video see you later
